title: lotus sessilifolius
intro: Lotus sessilifolius, also known as the dwarf lotus or Sessile-leaf lotus, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the Nelumbonaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting skin health. In herbal preparations, Lotus sessilifolius is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is commonly combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
